title: Finder Full-Loop Grounding Demo
query: white table with dark legs on the right side

stages.name: Plan
stages.line: Parse the request into a primary target, support context, and scoped frame budget.
stages.caption: Finder first turns the language request into target phrases and routes a compact evidence set for the loop.
logs: planner.reason: Loop 0: LLM planner selected 'white table' as the primary target with 0 supporting target(s).
evidence.goals: Find a white table object; Verify the table has dark-colored legs; Confirm the table is positioned on the right side of the viewed scene

stages.name: Detect
stages.line: Run SAM3 only as the open-vocabulary mask proposal backend, then build 3D candidates.
stages.caption: The detector surfaces multiple plausible object masks; downstream Finder stages keep the ambiguity instead of taking the top SAM3 mask directly.
logs: detect.backend: remote SAM3 masks, Finder 3D clustering and dedup
detect.top: white_table_l0_000 det=0.92; white_table_l0_014 det=0.92; white_table_l0_004 det=0.92; white_table_l0_005 det=0.91

stages.name: Evidence
stages.line: Attach candidate-local geometry and support-object evidence before planning selection.
stages.caption: Candidate evidence makes support relations explicit, so the later selector compares candidates in context rather than by mask confidence alone.
logs: evidence.reason: geometry and support cues are available to selection planner

stages.name: Selection Plan
stages.line: Shortlist candidates and choose comparison axes for verification.
stages.caption: The selection planner narrows the candidate pool and specifies what relation or attribute evidence must be checked.
logs: selection.reason: Query specifies 'white table with dark legs on the right side'. No relation evidence is available, so spatial positioning from 'right side' hint is primary filter. Analyzing cen...
actions: filter candidates by spatial hint 'right side'; compare candidate positions for right-side placement; verify table appearance (white, dark legs) on shortlisted candidates

stages.name: Select
stages.line: Compare shortlisted candidates with VLM verification and select the strongest candidate.
stages.caption: The selector compares the shortlisted candidates and records rationales for why the accepted candidate beats alternatives.
logs: select.scores: white_table_l0_003 sel=0.71; white_table_l0_004 sel=0.71; white_table_l0_000 sel=0.71

select.reason: Visual verification of three candidates for 'white table with dark legs on the right side'. Candidate white_table_l0_000 (image_index=1) is a small round white table with dark legs, locat...
verifier.summary: Visual verification of three candidates for 'white table with dark legs on the right side'. Candidate white_table_l0_000 (image_index=1) is a small round white table with dark l...

stages.name: Judge
stages.caption: The loop judge accepts the selected candidate once the evidence is sufficient; otherwise the same protocol can continue with feedback.
logs: judge.reason: Candidate white_table_l0_003 is the strongest match for 'white table with dark legs on the right side'. Visual verification confirms strong match for all query attributes (white surface, dark legs, right-side position...
